description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle (“Cruise AV”), operating in autonomous mode, was waiting for oncoming traffic to clear the intersection 
before making a left turn onto Bush Street from southbound Steiner Street when another vehicle made contact with the right rear corner of 
the Cruise AV, damaging the Cruise AV’s right rear fascia, bumper, and wheel well. There were no injuries and police were not called.
Go to Page 3
